name: SIP Simulator
metaTitle: SIP Simulator — Real Returns Calculator | c7xai
metaDescription: See what your SIP actually earns after inflation and tax. Client-side, no PII, no signup.
shortDescription: See actual returns after inflation and tax

faq.question: How much will my SIP grow in 20 years?
faq.answer: A ₹10,000/month SIP at 12% for 20 years grows to approximately ₹1.02 crore nominally, but after 6% inflation, the real value is about ₹30.5 lakh. After LTCG tax, you keep even less.

faq.question: What is real return vs nominal return?
faq.answer: Nominal return is what your investment grows to in absolute numbers. Real return adjusts for inflation — what your money can actually buy in the future. A 12% nominal return with 6% inflation is roughly a 5.7% real return.

faq.question: How does LTCG tax affect SIP returns?
faq.answer: Long-Term Capital Gains tax at 12.5% applies to equity mutual fund gains above ₹1.25 lakh per year. This can reduce your effective returns by 0.5-1% annually depending on your holding period and gain size.

faq.question: Should I step up my SIP every year?
faq.answer: A 10% annual step-up on a ₹10,000 SIP can increase your final corpus by 40-60% over 20 years. Step-up SIPs work because they match your likely income growth with higher investments.

howToSteps.name: Enter monthly investment
howToSteps.text: Set your monthly SIP amount in the slider

howToSteps.name: Set expected return rate
howToSteps.text: Adjust the expected annual return (default: 12% for NIFTY)

howToSteps.name: Adjust inflation
howToSteps.text: Set the inflation rate to see real vs nominal returns

howToSteps.name: See real vs nominal returns
howToSteps.text: Compare what your SIP grows to vs what it's actually worth after inflation
